expectations.text: Ran fetch_reddit.py script (not just web search)
expectations.evidence: metrics.json shows WebSearch: 12 calls, Bash: 0. transcript_summary.md confirms 'fetch_reddit.py / fetch_hn.py は使用せず'. Used WebSearch for all research.

expectations.text: Ran fetch_hn.py script (not just web search)
expectations.evidence: Same as above — no script execution. transcript_summary.md: 'fetch_reddit.py / fetch_hn.py は使用せず'.

expectations.text: Generated at least 5 distinct product ideas
expectations.evidence: report.md lists 6 ranked ideas: Routine Conflict App, Long-Term Skincare Journal, Cross-Brand Shade Finder, Precision Beauty, Hormonal Skin Companion, Review Aggregator.

expectations.text: Each idea has a 5-row scoring table with all 5 dimensions
expectations.evidence: report.md uses a simple 4-column table (Rank/Idea/Score/Buildable?) with a single 10-point score. Does not use the 5 dimensions: 実現可能性/開発期間/収益性/競合優位性/小規模適性.

expectations.text: Saved report file under reports/2025/ directory
expectations.evidence: transcript_summary.md: 'reports/ ディレクトリへの保存なし'. metrics.json shows files_created: [].

expectations.text: Report file path was communicated to the user
expectations.evidence: No file was created, so no path could be communicated.

eval_feedback.overall: Assertions are highly discriminating. The without-skill run fails 5/6 because it lacks structured workflow, scripts, and file output — exactly what the skill provides.
